text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Um, Trainer? Is anything troubling you?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Are you lonely? Would you like some company?
Do you want to lay down on my lap?
choice_data_list: Wh-what's this all of a sudden?
Wh-what's this all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's just that nobody's been coming to me to be
coddled lately...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
But I really wanna ruffle someone's hair, or give
out big hugs, or shower people with
compliments...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I feel so unwanted. Won't you let me spoil you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems like Super Creek isn't feeling her best
because she hasn't been able to coddle anyone
for a while like she usually does.
